caption: The video captures the view from an airplane window as it taxis on the runway after landing. The camera is positioned inside the aircraft, providing a clear view of the wing and part of the fuselage. The landscape outside consists of a flat, arid terrain with patches of dry grass and distant mountains under a bright blue sky. As the plane moves forward, the scenery shifts slightly, revealing more of the surrounding area, including some greenery and possibly a small structure or vehicle in the distance. The overall atmosphere suggests a sunny day with good visibility, and the smooth movement of the plane indicates it is preparing for takeoff or has just landed.
